dialogue.text: The Myers-Brigg personality test is one of the most popular and well-known personality tests out there.
dialogue.zh: 邁爾斯-布里格人格測試是最受歡迎且知名的人格測試之一。
dialogue.ja: Myers-Briggsの性格テストは、最も人気がありよく知られている性格テストの一つです
dialogue.local: The Myers-Brigg personality test is one of the most popular and well-known personality tests out there.
dialogue.en: The Myers-Brigg personality test is one of the most popular and well-known personality tests out there.
dialogue.local_pron: The Myers-Brigg personality test is one of the most popular and well-known personality tests out there.
dialogue.en_pron: The Myers-Brigg personality test is one of the most popular and well-known personality tests out there.

dialogue.text: It divides people into 16 types, ranging from the most rare, the INFJ, representing only 1.5% of the population, to the most common.
dialogue.zh: 它將人們分為16種類型，從最罕見的INFJ（佔人口的1.5%）到最常見的類型。
dialogue.ja: このテストは人々を16のタイプに分けます。最も珍しいINFJから始まり、
dialogue.local: It divides people into 16 types, ranging from the most rare, the INFJ, representing only 1.5% of the population, to the most common.
dialogue.en: It divides people into 16 types, ranging from the most rare, the INFJ, representing only 1.5% of the population, to the most common.
dialogue.local_pron: It divides people into 16 types, ranging from the most rare, the INFJ, representing only 1.5% of the population, to the most common.
dialogue.en_pron: It divides people into 16 types, ranging from the most rare, the INFJ, representing only 1.5% of the population, to the most common.

dialogue.text: The ISFJ, which makes up about 14% of the population.
dialogue.zh: ISFJ約佔人口的14%。
dialogue.ja: 人口のわずか1.5％を占めるINFJから、最も一般的なISFJまで、約14％を占めます。
dialogue.local: The ISFJ, which makes up about 14% of the population.
dialogue.en: The ISFJ, which makes up about 14% of the population.
dialogue.local_pron: The ISFJ, which makes up about 14% of the population.
dialogue.en_pron: The ISFJ, which makes up about 14% of the population.

dialogue.text: Today on Charisma, we're going to help you figure out what your Myers-Briggs personality type is.
dialogue.zh: 今天在Charisma，我們將幫助你找出你的邁爾斯-布里格人格類型。
dialogue.ja: 人口です。今日はCharismaで、あなたのMyers-Briggsの性格タイプを見つけるお手伝いをします。
dialogue.local: Today on Charisma, we're going to help you figure out what your Myers-Briggs personality type is.
dialogue.en: Today on Charisma, we're going to help you figure out what your Myers-Briggs personality type is.
dialogue.local_pron: Today on Charisma, we're going to help you figure out what your Myers-Briggs personality type is.
dialogue.en_pron: Today on Charisma, we're going to help you figure out what your Myers-Briggs personality type is.

dialogue.text: Before we get into the 16 types, let's take a look at how the test categorizes people according to four dimensions.
dialogue.zh: 在介紹16種類型之前，讓我們先看看測試如何根據四個維度來分類人們。
dialogue.ja: タイプです。16のタイプに入る前に、このテストがどのように人々を分類するかを見てみましょう。
dialogue.local: Before we get into the 16 types, let's take a look at how the test categorizes people according to four dimensions.
dialogue.en: Before we get into the 16 types, let's take a look at how the test categorizes people according to four dimensions.
dialogue.local_pron: Before we get into the 16 types, let's take a look at how the test categorizes people according to four dimensions.
dialogue.en_pron: Before we get into the 16 types, let's take a look at how the test categorizes people according to four dimensions.

dialogue.text: Dimension 1. Introversion versus Extroversion.
dialogue.zh: 維度一：內向與外向。
dialogue.ja: 人々を4つの次元に分類します。次元1：内向性対外向性。この次元は
dialogue.local: Dimension 1. Introversion versus Extroversion.
dialogue.en: Dimension 1. Introversion versus Extroversion.
dialogue.local_pron: Dimension 1. Introversion versus Extroversion.
dialogue.en_pron: Dimension 1. Introversion versus Extroversion.

dialogue.text: This dimension refers to how people derive energy.
dialogue.zh: 這個維度指的是人們如何獲取能量。
dialogue.ja: 人がどのようにエネルギーを得るかを指します。内向的な人は一人でいることでエネルギーを得ますが、外向的な人は
dialogue.local: This dimension refers to how people derive energy.
dialogue.en: This dimension refers to how people derive energy.
dialogue.local_pron: This dimension refers to how people derive energy.
dialogue.en_pron: This dimension refers to how people derive energy.

dialogue.text: Introverts get energy from being alone, while extroverts become energized from their external environment, which usually means being around other people.
dialogue.zh: 內向者從獨處中獲得能量，而外向者則從外部環境中獲得能量，通常是與他人在一起。
dialogue.ja: 外部の環境からエネルギーを得ます。これは通常、他の人と一緒にいることを意味します。
dialogue.local: Introverts get energy from being alone, while extroverts become energized from their external environment, which usually means being around other people.
dialogue.en: Introverts get energy from being alone, while extroverts become energized from their external environment, which usually means being around other people.
dialogue.local_pron: Introverts get energy from being alone, while extroverts become energized from their external environment, which usually means being around other people.
dialogue.en_pron: Introverts get energy from being alone, while extroverts become energized from their external environment, which usually means being around other people.

dialogue.text: Dimension 2. Intuition versus Sensing.
dialogue.zh: 維度二：直覺與感知。
dialogue.ja: 次元2：直感対感覚。これは人々が周囲の世界をどのように見るかを示します。
dialogue.local: Dimension 2. Intuition versus Sensing.
dialogue.en: Dimension 2. Intuition versus Sensing.
dialogue.local_pron: Dimension 2. Intuition versus Sensing.
dialogue.en_pron: Dimension 2. Intuition versus Sensing.

dialogue.text: This looks at how people view the world around them.
dialogue.zh: 這看的是人們如何看待周遭的世界。
dialogue.ja: 直感を持つ人は想像力豊かで、アイデアや抽象的な概念に焦点を当てます。感覚を持つ人は
dialogue.local: This looks at how people view the world around them.
dialogue.en: This looks at how people view the world around them.
dialogue.local_pron: This looks at how people view the world around them.
dialogue.en_pron: This looks at how people view the world around them.

dialogue.text: Those with intuition are imaginative and focus on ideas and abstract concepts.
dialogue.zh: 有直覺的人富有想像力，專注於想法和抽象概念。
dialogue.ja: 論理、事実、実用性により注意を払います。次元3：思考対感情。
dialogue.local: Those with intuition are imaginative and focus on ideas and abstract concepts.
dialogue.en: Those with intuition are imaginative and focus on ideas and abstract concepts.
dialogue.local_pron: Those with intuition are imaginative and focus on ideas and abstract concepts.
dialogue.en_pron: Those with intuition are imaginative and focus on ideas and abstract concepts.

dialogue.text: Those with sensing pay more attention to logic, facts, and practicality.
dialogue.zh: 有感知的人則更注重邏輯、事實和實用性。
dialogue.ja: この要素は人々がどのように意思決定をするかを見ます。思考タイプの人は決定を下します。
dialogue.local: Those with sensing pay more attention to logic, facts, and practicality.
dialogue.en: Those with sensing pay more attention to logic, facts, and practicality.
dialogue.local_pron: Those with sensing pay more attention to logic, facts, and practicality.
dialogue.en_pron: Those with sensing pay more attention to logic, facts, and practicality.

dialogue.text: Dimension 3. Thinking versus Feeling.
dialogue.zh: 維度三：思考與情感。
dialogue.ja: 感情タイプの人は心で決定を下します。そして最後に、次元4：判断
dialogue.local: Dimension 3. Thinking versus Feeling.
dialogue.en: Dimension 3. Thinking versus Feeling.
dialogue.local_pron: Dimension 3. Thinking versus Feeling.
dialogue.en_pron: Dimension 3. Thinking versus Feeling.

dialogue.text: This component looks at how people make decisions.
dialogue.zh: 這個部分看的是人們如何做決定。
dialogue.ja: 対知覚。この最後の次元は他人があなたをどう見るかを示します。あなたは整理整頓された印象を与えますか？
dialogue.local: This component looks at how people make decisions.
dialogue.en: This component looks at how people make decisions.
dialogue.local_pron: This component looks at how people make decisions.
dialogue.en_pron: This component looks at how people make decisions.

dialogue.text: Those with a thinking dimension make decisions while those with a feeling dimension make decisions with their heart.
dialogue.zh: 思考型的人用理智做決定，情感型的人則用心做決定。
dialogue.ja: 論理的ですか？もしそうなら、あなたは判断的な性質を持っているかもしれません。もし人々があなたを自発的で
dialogue.local: Those with a thinking dimension make decisions while those with a feeling dimension make decisions with their heart.
dialogue.en: Those with a thinking dimension make decisions while those with a feeling dimension make decisions with their heart.
dialogue.local_pron: Those with a thinking dimension make decisions while those with a feeling dimension make decisions with their heart.
dialogue.en_pron: Those with a thinking dimension make decisions while those with a feeling dimension make decisions with their heart.

dialogue.text: And lastly, dimension 4. Judging versus Perceiving.
dialogue.zh: 最後，維度四：判斷與知覺。
dialogue.ja: 柔軟だと見なすなら、あなたは知覚型に分類されるかもしれません。これで各カテゴリーの概要がわかりました。
dialogue.local: And lastly, dimension 4. Judging versus Perceiving.
dialogue.en: And lastly, dimension 4. Judging versus Perceiving.
dialogue.local_pron: And lastly, dimension 4. Judging versus Perceiving.
dialogue.en_pron: And lastly, dimension 4. Judging versus Perceiving.

dialogue.text: This last dimension looks at how others see you.
dialogue.zh: 這最後一個維度看的是別人如何看待你。
dialogue.ja: タイプに入りましょう。1番目はENTJ、コマンダーです。達成感が何より好きなら、
dialogue.local: This last dimension looks at how others see you.
dialogue.en: This last dimension looks at how others see you.
dialogue.local_pron: This last dimension looks at how others see you.
dialogue.en_pron: This last dimension looks at how others see you.

dialogue.text: Do you come across as organized and logical? If so, you might have a judging quality.
dialogue.zh: 你給人有組織且理性的印象嗎？如果是，你可能有判斷型特質。
dialogue.ja: 達成感があれば、あなたはENTJかもしれません。この性格タイプはビジョンを作り出すことに優れています。
dialogue.local: Do you come across as organized and logical? If so, you might have a judging quality.
dialogue.en: Do you come across as organized and logical? If so, you might have a judging quality.
dialogue.local_pron: Do you come across as organized and logical? If so, you might have a judging quality.
dialogue.en_pron: Do you come across as organized and logical? If so, you might have a judging quality.

dialogue.text: If people see you as being spontaneous and flexible, you might be categorized as perceiving.
dialogue.zh: 如果別人覺得你很隨性且有彈性，你可能被歸類為知覺型。
dialogue.ja: そしてそのビジョンを最後まで実行します。そのため、ENTJはしばしば
dialogue.local: If people see you as being spontaneous and flexible, you might be categorized as perceiving.
dialogue.en: If people see you as being spontaneous and flexible, you might be categorized as perceiving.
dialogue.local_pron: If people see you as being spontaneous and flexible, you might be categorized as perceiving.
dialogue.en_pron: If people see you as being spontaneous and flexible, you might be categorized as perceiving.

dialogue.text: Now that you have an overview of each category, let's dive into the types.
dialogue.zh: 現在你已經了解每個類別的概況，讓我們深入了解各類型。
dialogue.ja: 自分が決めたことを何でも成し遂げる能力で知られています。指揮官というニックネームが示すように、
dialogue.local: Now that you have an overview of each category, let's dive into the types.
dialogue.en: Now that you have an overview of each category, let's dive into the types.
dialogue.local_pron: Now that you have an overview of each category, let's dive into the types.
dialogue.en_pron: Now that you have an overview of each category, let's dive into the types.

dialogue.text: Number 1. ENTJ. The Commander.
dialogue.zh: 第一種。ENTJ，指揮官。
dialogue.ja: Number 1. ENTJ. The Commander.
dialogue.local: Number 1. ENTJ. The Commander.
dialogue.en: Number 1. ENTJ. The Commander.
dialogue.local_pron: Number 1. ENTJ. The Commander.
dialogue.en_pron: Number 1. ENTJ. The Commander.

dialogue.text: If you love nothing more than the feeling of accomplishment, you may be an ENTJ.
dialogue.zh: 如果你最喜歡的就是成就感，你可能是ENTJ。
dialogue.ja: 2番目はISTJ、インスペクターです。歴史上最も成功したリーダーや革新者の中には、
dialogue.local: If you love nothing more than the feeling of accomplishment, you may be an ENTJ.
dialogue.en: If you love nothing more than the feeling of accomplishment, you may be an ENTJ.
dialogue.local_pron: If you love nothing more than the feeling of accomplishment, you may be an ENTJ.
dialogue.en_pron: If you love nothing more than the feeling of accomplishment, you may be an ENTJ.

dialogue.text: This personality type excels at creating a vision and then executing that vision to the very end.
dialogue.zh: 這種人格類型擅長創造願景並將其執行到底。
dialogue.ja: This personality type excels at creating a vision and then executing that vision to the very end.
dialogue.local: This personality type excels at creating a vision and then executing that vision to the very end.
dialogue.en: This personality type excels at creating a vision and then executing that vision to the very end.
dialogue.local_pron: This personality type excels at creating a vision and then executing that vision to the very end.
dialogue.en_pron: This personality type excels at creating a vision and then executing that vision to the very end.

dialogue.text: Because of this, ENTJs are often known for their ability to accomplish anything they put their mind to.
dialogue.zh: 因此，ENTJ常以能完成任何他們專注的事而聞名。
dialogue.ja: Because of this, ENTJs are often known for their ability to accomplish anything they put their mind to.
dialogue.local: Because of this, ENTJs are often known for their ability to accomplish anything they put their mind to.
dialogue.en: Because of this, ENTJs are often known for their ability to accomplish anything they put their mind to.
dialogue.local_pron: Because of this, ENTJs are often known for their ability to accomplish anything they put their mind to.
dialogue.en_pron: Because of this, ENTJs are often known for their ability to accomplish anything they put their mind to.

dialogue.text: And as indicated by their commander nickname, ENTJs also make great leaders because of their charisma and natural authority.
dialogue.zh: 正如他們的指揮官綽號所示，ENTJ因其魅力和天生的權威也成為優秀的領導者。
dialogue.ja: And as indicated by their commander nickname, ENTJs also make great leaders because of their charisma and natural authority.
dialogue.local: And as indicated by their commander nickname, ENTJs also make great leaders because of their charisma and natural authority.
dialogue.en: And as indicated by their commander nickname, ENTJs also make great leaders because of their charisma and natural authority.
dialogue.local_pron: And as indicated by their commander nickname, ENTJs also make great leaders because of their charisma and natural authority.
dialogue.en_pron: And as indicated by their commander nickname, ENTJs also make great leaders because of their charisma and natural authority.
